'''Kerred Santhe''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] industrialist from [[Lianna/Legends|Lianna]] and a member of the [[Santhe family/Legends|Santhe family]]. He acquired a controlling share in [[Sienar Technologies]] and its subsidiary [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] around [[99 BBY/Legends|99 BBY]]. As a result, Sienar Technologies was renamed [[Santhe/Sienar Technologies]] and made a subsidiary of [[Santhe Corporation/Legends|Santhe Corporation]].<ref name="MtL" />
He was [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis's]] first murder under the tutelage of [[Darth Tenebrous/Legends|Darth Tenebrous]].<ref name="Darth P" />

His granddaughter was [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valles Santhe]].<ref name="MtL" />
